models.Task: A structured action item extracted by the AI pipeline, with assignee info denormalized for display.
models.PersonSummary: Minimal person info shown inline on task rows (name, role) and used for the assignee filter dropdown.
models.SourceSummary: Minimal source info used for the source filter dropdown.
models.TaskMessage: A raw message associated with a task — original or related — displayed in the task detail modal.
models.ChatMessage: A single message in the LLM chat conversation, either from the user or the assistant.

relationships: Task belongs to a PersonSummary via userId
Task was extracted from a SourceSummary via sourceId
TaskMessage belongs to a Task via taskId
ChatMessage belongs to the chat conversation thread

tasks.title: Review supplier contract renewal terms
tasks.summary: Supplier contract for raw materials expires end of March. James needs to review pricing terms and negotiate bulk discount before renewal deadline.

tasks.title: Approve Q1 campaign budget allocation
tasks.summary: Marketing budget for Q1 campaigns needs final sign-off. Three proposals submitted by agency, Sarah to pick one and confirm spend breakdown by Wednesday.

tasks.title: Schedule load testing for payment gateway
tasks.summary: Payment gateway integration going live in March. Amir needs to schedule load testing with the infrastructure team and provide results to the CTO.

tasks.title: Reconcile January vendor invoices
tasks.summary: Six vendor invoices from January are still unreconciled. Priya to match POs, verify amounts, and post to the ledger before month-end close.

tasks.title: Coordinate warehouse stock audit
tasks.summary: Annual stock audit due by mid-March. James to align with warehouse team on scheduling and ensure digital inventory records are up to date.

tasks.title: Brief design team on rebrand guidelines
tasks.summary: New brand guidelines finalized. Sarah to schedule a walkthrough with the design team and share the updated asset kit.

tasks.title: Follow up with shipping carrier on delayed containers
tasks.summary: Two containers from Shenzhen are 8 days overdue. Carlos to escalate with the carrier and get revised ETAs for the warehouse team.

tasks.title: Document API rate limiting strategy
tasks.summary: API rate limiting approach needs to be documented before the partner integration review. Amir to write up the strategy doc and share with the team.

tasks.title: Send updated SLA to Meridian Group
tasks.summary: Meridian Group requested updated SLA terms after the last incident. Fatima to finalize the revised document and send it for client approval.

tasks.title: Prepare cash flow forecast for board meeting
tasks.summary: Board meeting on March 12 requires a 6-month rolling cash flow forecast. Priya to pull actuals and build the projection model.

tasks.title: Update freight rate comparison sheet
tasks.summary: Quarterly freight rate comparison is due. Carlos to collect latest quotes from 4 carriers and update the shared spreadsheet.

tasks.title: Schedule quarterly business review with Atlas Corp
tasks.summary: QBR for Atlas Corp is overdue. Fatima to propose 3 dates and coordinate with their VP of operations.

messages.content: James, the supplier contract for raw materials is coming up for renewal end of March. Can you review the pricing terms? We should try for a bulk discount this time.
I'll pull the current terms today and compare with two alternative suppliers. Should have a recommendation by Friday.
Sarah, the agency sent over three proposals for Q1. Budget ranges from 45K to 72K. Need your pick by Wednesday so we can lock in media buys.
Priya, 6 vendor invoices from January still show as unreconciled in the system. Can you prioritize these before month-end close?
Carlos, the two containers from Shenzhen are now 8 days overdue. The warehouse team is asking for updated ETAs. Can you escalate with the carrier?
On it. I've sent an escalation email to the carrier's ops desk. Will update once I get revised ETAs.
Fatima, Meridian Group is asking for the updated SLA. They want it before the end of the month following the incident last week.

chatMessages.content: Which high-priority tasks are overdue right now?

There are 2 high-priority tasks currently overdue:

1. **Reconcile January vendor invoices** — assigned to Priya Nair (Finance Controller), due 20 Feb. Six vendor invoices still unreconciled.

2. **Follow up with shipping carrier on delayed containers** — assigned to Carlos Mendes (Logistics Coordinator), due 22 Feb. Two containers from Shenzhen are 8 days late.

Both need immediate attention. Would you like me to summarize the context from the original messages?
